annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under S.C. Code Ann. § 34-31-20(A) — 8.75% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from South Carolina’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Verify against the statute text. Not legal advice.
